description: Lawfirm Management System (LMS) RBAC - permission map per role

specialAction.all: Grants create, read, update, and delete for the module

CEO.description: Full administrative access across all modules

Partner.description: Full administrative access across all modules

Senior Attorney.description: Create/read/update on Cases and Clients; read-only on Ledger, Marketing, Personnel

Attorney.description: Create and read Cases and Clients only; no access to other modules

Law Student.description: Read-only access to Cases and Clients; no access to other modules
